parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor User
participant WebSite
participant Server
database phonebook

User -> WebSite : select contact
User -> WebSite : click button\n"DeleteContact"
activate WebSite
WebSite -> Server : deleteContact()
activate Server
Server -> phonebook : Update()
activate phonebook
phonebook -> Server : ok
deactivate phonebook
Server -> WebSite : ok
deactivate Server
deactivate WebSite

WebSite -> Server : getAllContacts()
activate WebSite
activate Server
Server -> phonebook : findAll()
activate phonebook
phonebook -> Server : ContactsList
deactivate phonebook
Server -> WebSite : ContactsList
deactivate Server
deactivate WebSite
@enduml
```
